description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword with a matching scabbard. The blade is gently curved, single-edged, and highly polished, typical of katana geometry. The handle is wrapped in black material with gold diamond-shaped accents and features a prominent circular guard with ornate gold detailing. The scabbard is black with gold embellishments at the mouth and end, matching the handle's decorative motifs. The sword and scabbard both display intricate gold fittings, suggesting ceremonial or high-status use. The overall craftsmanship and ornamentation indicate a weapon that is both functional and decorative.
description: A traditional Japanese katana with a curved blade, ornate gold-accented handle, and matching black and gold scabbard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the katana, its curved blade, ornate handle, and matching scabbard with gold accents.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular guard and the alignment of the handle and scabbard, with minimal blade visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the blade, handle, and scabbard with visible gold decorative elements.
description_view_3: Direct end view focusing on the guard and handle alignment, with the blade and scabbard mostly hidden.
attribute_handle_design: wrapped, straight handle with black material and gold diamond-shaped accents
attribute_ornamentation: gold accents and decorative fittings on handle, guard, and scabbard
